keywordGapSubtitle: Find palabras clave your competidores rank for that you don't
keywordGapNoCompetitors: Aún no se han añadido competidores
keywordGapNoCompetitorsHint: Añadir competidores to discover palabra clave opportunities
keywordGapSelectPrompt: Select a competidor to view palabra clave gaps
keywordGapBulkActions: Bulk actions will be available soon
overlapEmpty: Añadir competidores and monitor palabras clave to see overlap data
contentGapNoCompetitors: Aún no se han añadido competidores
tooltipPriorityDesc: Overall prioridad based on opportunity score and search volumen
tooltipScoreDesc: Opportunity score (0-100) combining volumen, dificultad, and competidor posición
tooltipEstTrafficDesc: Estimated monthly tráfico you could capture by ranking for this palabra clave
tooltipDifficultyDesc: How hard it is to rank for this palabra clave (0-100)
reportsGenerateAll: Generate Reports for Todas las palabras clave
reportTooltipKeywordDesc: The palabra clave phrase analyzed in the report
reportTooltipStatusDesc: Current processing status of the report
reportTooltipAvgPosDesc: Promedio SERP posición across top results
reportTooltipTopUrlDesc: The highest ranking URL for this palabra clave
contentAnalysisSubtitle: Compare on-page SEO metrics with competidor pages
competitorMgmtNoCompetitors: Aún no se han añadido competidores
removeCompetitorConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this competidor? It will be hidden from tracking.
removeCompetitorsConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {count} competidor(s)?
contentGapSectionSubtitle: Identify palabra clave opportunities where competidores rank but you don't
contentGapSectionTooltip: Contenido gap analysis compares your palabra clave rankings with competidores to find opportunities you're missing.
competitorOverviewNoCompetitors: Aún no se han añadido competidores
competitorOverviewNoCompetitorsHint: Añadir competidores to compare rankings over time
competitorOverviewNoDataHint: Check competidor posiciones to populate the chart
gapTrendsEmpty: No trend data yet. Run content gap analysis to start tracking.
addCompetitorSubtitle: Discover competidores from your data or add one manually
addCompetitorSerpDesc: Dominios that rank for your monitored palabras clave.
addCompetitorSerpEmpty: No competidores found in SERP data yet
addCompetitorSerpEmptyHint: Monitor more palabras clave to discover competidores
addCompetitorSuggestDesc: Dominios that compete for the same organic palabras clave as you.
addCompetitorManualDesc: Enter a competidor dominio to add it directly.
addCompetitorManualDomainNote: Enter the dominio without http:// or www.
contentGapDetailScoreBreakdownDesc: The opportunity score (0-100) is calculated from three factors: search volumen potential, palabra clave dificultad, and competidor ranking posición.
contentGapDetailVolumeDesc: Based on {volume} búsquedas mensuales. Higher volumen = more points (up to 50).
contentGapDetailDifficultyDesc: Dificultad is {difficulty}/100 ({label}). Lower dificultad = more points.
contentGapDetailWhoRanks: Who Ranks For This Palabra clave
contentGapDetailWhoRanksDesc: Shows which competidor currently ranks for this palabra clave, their posición, and the specific URL that ranks.
contentGapDetailNoRankingDesc: You currently have no ranking for this palabra clave. This is a pure content gap — creating a dedicated page could capture this tráfico.
contentGapDetailWhatToDoDesc: Actionable recommendations based on palabra clave dificultad, search volumen, competidor posición, and your current ranking status.
recEasyWinDesc: Bajo dificultad palabra clave — create a well-optimized page targeting this phrase. With quality content and basic on-page SEO, you can rank relatively quickly.
recModerateEffortDesc: Medio dificultad — build comprehensive, in-depth content with strong internal linking. Consider creating a pillar page covering this topic thoroughly.
recHighCompetitionDesc: Difficult palabra clave — build topical authority first by targeting related easier palabras clave. Then create pillar content backed by quality backlinks.
recHighValueTargetDesc: Your competidor ranks in the top 3 for this high-volumen palabra clave. Study their content structure, word count, and backlink profile to create something better.
recSignificantTrafficDesc: Alto search volumen palabra clave. Even ranking in posiciones 5-10 could drive substantial organic tráfico to your site.
recCreateNewContentDesc: You have no rankings for this palabra clave yet. Create a dedicated, optimized page targeting this specific topic and search intent.
recImproveExistingDesc: You currently rank at posición {position}. Update and improve your existing page — add more depth, better structure, and relevant internal links.
recQuickContentPieceDesc: Bajo volumen but very easy to rank for. Bueno for building topical coverage and internal linking structure.
generateReportConfirmation: This will run all analyses and collect data into a downloadable PDF:
generateReportStepBacklinks: Run competidor backlink analysis (if data is stale)
generateReportStepContentGaps: Analyze brechas de contenido with competidores
generateReportStepCollect: Collect all metrics into a downloadable PDF
generateReportFreshDataNote: Fresh data (less than 24h old) will be reused. This may take a few minutes.
reportProfileQuickDesc: Executive summary with health score and key metrics
reportProfileStandardDesc: Core analysis: palabras clave, backlinks, and brechas de contenido
reportEditorDragHint: Drag sections to reorder, toggle to include/exclude
gapSummaryTotalGapsTooltip: Total palabras clave where at least one competidor ranks but you don't. More gaps = more untapped opportunities.
gapSummaryHighPriorityTooltip: Gaps scored 70+ de 100, indicating high search volumen, low dificultad, or competidor ranking in top posiciones. Best opportunities to pursue first.
gapSummaryEstTrafficTooltip: Estimated visitas mensuales you could gain by ranking for all gap palabras clave. Calculated assuming ~30% click-through rate for top posiciones.
gapSummaryCompetitorsTooltip: Number of unique competidor dominios analyzed in the content gap comparison.
gapComparisonTooltip: Compares how many brechas de contenido each competidor contributes. Competidores with many high-prioridad gaps likely target topics you are missing entirely.
overlapSummary: {totalKeywords} palabras clave across {competitorCount} competidor(s) · You rank for {youRanking}
overlapNoMatchHint: Intenta ajustar tu búsqueda o filtros.
contentGapNoCompetitorsHint: Añadir competidores to discover content gap opportunities
contentGapDescription: Palabras clave where competidores rank but you don't. Higher scores indicate easier wins with more tráfico potential.
contentGapNoOpportunitiesHint: Run content gap analysis to find opportunities
tooltipKeywordDesc: The search phrase that represents this content gap opportunity.
tooltipCompetitorDesc: The competidor dominio that currently ranks for this palabra clave.
tooltipScoreFullDesc: Weighted score (0-100): search volumen (up to 50pts) + dificultad bonus (up to 50pts) + posición bonus (+20 for top 3, +10 for top 10). Higher is better.
tooltipVolumeDesc: Promedio monthly search volumen for this palabra clave. Higher volumen means more potential tráfico.
tooltipDifficultyFullDesc: Palabra clave dificultad score (0-100). Lower values indicate easier palabras clave to rank for. Based on backlink profiles of current top results.
tooltipCompPosDesc: The posición where the competidor currently ranks for this palabra clave in search results.
tooltipStatusFullDesc: Identificado = newly found, Monitorización = being tracked, Ranking = you now rank, Descartado = not relevant.
tooltipPriorityFullDesc: Automatically assigned based on opportunity score: Alto (70+), Medio (40-69), Bajo (below 40).
reportsEmptyDesc: Create reports from palabra clave monitorización to analyze competidor content strategies and get actionable recommendations.
reportsToastAllAlready: Todos palabras clave already have reports
reportsTooltipKeyword: The target palabra clave this analysis was created for
reportsTooltipCompetitors: Number of competidor pages analyzed for this palabra clave
reportsTooltipAvgWords: Promedio word count across analyzed competidor pages
reportsTooltipAvgH2: Promedio number of H2 headings used by competidor pages
reportsTooltipAvgImages: Promedio number of images used by competidor pages
contentAnalysisNoCompetitorsHint: Añadir competidores above to analyze their page content
contentAnalysisNoDataHint: Click "Analyze Página" to fetch competidor page analysis
contentAnalysisSelectPrompt: Select a competidor and palabra clave to view content analysis
contentAnalysisNotRanking: Sin posición or no analysis available
contentAnalysisInsightWordsAdd: Consider adding {count} more words to match competidor depth
contentAnalysisInsightH2Add: Añadir {count} more H2 headings for better structure
contentAnalysisPageAnalysisStarted: Página analysis started — results will appear shortly
recIncreaseContentDesc: Competidores average {avgWords} words. {gap, select, positive {Add ~{gapWords} more words.} other {Your content is shorter.}}
recIncreaseContentStep1: Expand existing sections with more detail
recImproveHeadingsDesc: Competidores use an average of {count} H2 headings. Añadir more section headings.
recImproveHeadingsStep1: Break content into clear sections with H2 tags
recAddImagesDesc: Competidores use an average of {count} images. Visual content improves engagement.
recAddImagesStep1: Añadir relevant images to each section
recAddImagesStep2: Use alt text with target palabras clave
recBuildBacklinksDesc: Analyze where competidores get their backlinks and target similar sources.
recBuildBacklinksStep1: Review competidor backlink sources in report
recBuildBacklinksStep2: Reach out to top dominios de referencia
createReportSelectHint: Select 1-3 competidores from SERP to analyze what makes them rank well
createReportFetchSerpFirst: Fetch SERP data for this palabra clave first
clickToDiscoverCompetitors: Click below to discover your organic search competidores
positionScatterDescription: Your posición vs competidor posición per palabra clave. Points below the diagonal = you rank better.
backlinkRadarDescription: Normalized backlink metrics comparison across your dominio and competidores (0-100 scale).
backlinkQualityDescription: Backlinks grouped by referring dominio rank tier (DR).
keywordBarsDescription: Posición comparison for your highest-volumen palabras clave. Lower posición number = better ranking.
contentGapBubbleDescription: Gap palabras clave plotted by dificultad vs search volumen. Bubble size = competidores ranking. Color = opportunity score.
winRateDescription: Palabra clave ranking wins, ties, and losses vs each competidor.
